&nbsp;

## Your Compass in the Technology Jungle

<br><br/>
Cloud Native isn't a product you buy; it's a methodology you must master. Before the first line of code is written or the first cluster starts, a solid foundation is required.
This is exactly where we come in: for us, consulting means setting the right course. We provide the strategy and the architecture. In short: the necessary know-how to ensure your journey in your own data center, or into the public or private cloud, doesn't end in chaos.
At tim&koko, we accompany you on this journey: without unnecessary technical jargon, but with plenty of passion and a hands-on mentality.
<br><br/>

### The tim&koko Magic Triangle

Technology alone doesn't solve problems. Our consulting always considers the bigger picture:

* **Technology Choice:** We evaluate the CNCF stack and select the tools that fit your strategy – not just what’s currently trending, whether on-premises or with hyperscalers.
* **Cultural Transformation:** We advise management and teams on the mindset shift toward DevOps and self-service structures.
* **Process Design:** Automation from A to Z. We establish CI/CD pipelines and GitOps workflows so that deployments work reliably at the push of a button.

<br><br/>

#### Our Approach: Your Journey to Kubernetes & Co.

* **Strategy & Architecture Review:** We evaluate which of your applications are "Cloud-Ready" and where modernization (refactoring) makes sense. We design the target architecture – for your data center or the cloud.
* **Platform Setup:** We support you in setting up your Kubernetes environment. We focus on security, monitoring, and logging from day one.
* **Hands-on Migration & Development:** We accompany the migration of your workloads. In the process, we coach your developers directly within the project to ensure knowledge stays in-house.
* **Operational Excellence:** We show you how to operate Cloud Native systems stably—from self-healing mechanisms to automated scaling strategies.

<br><br/>

### Cloud Native Principles – Infrastructure is Secondary

We focus on designing your IT landscape according to modern Cloud Native standards. The goal: your applications should be portable, scalable, and resilient.

* **Kubernetes as the Foundation:** We establish Kubernetes as the operating system of your data center. This creates a unified layer across various infrastructures.
* **On-Premises & Hybrid:** Want to keep full control of your data in your own data center but still use the agility of the cloud? We bring Cloud Native workflows directly to your own hardware.
* **Avoiding Vendor Lock-in:** By consistently using open-source standards (CNCF Stack), we ensure you always have the freedom to switch your infrastructure without having to touch your code.

<br><br/>

fill=\"#fff\"/></svg>"
  title="Why tim&koko" >}}

We aren't the consultants who show up in suits, present a PowerPoint, and disappear.

* **We think infrastructure-agnostically:** We don't force you into a specific cloud. We build systems that run wherever it makes the most sense for your business.
* **We play the full keyboard:** <br/>Whether it's bare-metal in your basement, vSphere, or managed Kubernetes in the cloud – we know the pitfalls of each layer.
* **Support at eye level:** We aren't an external "expert team" that throws solutions over the fence. We become part of your team until you can safely navigate the platform yourselves.

{{< /infobox >}}

### Whether On-Prem or Cloud: Let's make your infrastructure future-proof.

Kubernetes can be complex – with us as your partner, it will become your greatest competitive advantage. Let's talk over a (virtual) coffee about where you're currently stuck or where you want the journey to go. We look forward to taking off with you! 🚀🚀🚀

&nbsp;

<a class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill" href="mailto:hallo@tim-koko.ch">contact us</a>
